zh.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra是Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella和Toda Pérez de Arazuri的女兒，於大約1160年出生在西班牙納法洛亞阿札格拉。她和Diego López de Haro II至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1216年1月16日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞享年57歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra是Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella和Toda Pérez de Arazuri的女儿，于大约1160年出生在西班牙納法洛亞阿札格拉。她和Diego López de Haro II至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1216年1月16日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞享年57岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Pérez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Ramon, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish (Pérez): patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . This surname is also found in France. Compare De Perez .

variants.name: Parez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Pérez (see Perez ).
In some cases possibly also French (Nord), Walloon, and Flemish: variant of Paré (see Pare ) or Paret .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which was originally a nickname from an English dialect word meaning ‘fox’.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra was born about 1160, in Azagra, Nafarroa, Spain as the daughter of Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella and Toda Pérez de Arazuri. She had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Diego López de Haro II. She died on 16 January 1216, in Biscay, Basque Country, Spain, at the age of 57, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra est née environ 1160, à Azagra, Nafarroa, Espagne, fille de Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror d’Estella et Toda Pérez de Arazuri. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Diego López de Haro II. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1216, à Biscaye, Euskadi, Espagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra wurde um 1160 in Azagra, Nafarroa, Spanien, als Tochter von Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella und Toda Pérez de Arazuri geboren. Sie hatte mit Diego López de Haro II mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1216 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spanien und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra è nata il circa 1160 nel Azagra, Nafarroa, Spagna come figlia di Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella e Toda Pérez de Arazuri. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Diego López de Haro II. Morì il 16 gennaio 1216, nel Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spagna, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagraは約1160年にスペインナファロアアザグラでPedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de EstellaとToda Pérez de Arazuriの娘として生まれた。彼女はDiego López de Haro IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1216年1月16日にスペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤで57歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra(은)는 대략 1160년 스페인 나파로 아자그라에서 Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella(와)과 Toda Pérez de Arazuri의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Diego López de Haro II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 1월 16일 스페인 우스카디 비즈카야에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Azagra, Nafarroa, Espanha filha de Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella e Toda Pérez de Arazuri. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Diego López de Haro II. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1216, em Biscaia, Euskadi, Espanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra родилась около 1160 г. в местности азагра, нафарроа, Испания. Её родителей звали Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella и Toda Pérez de Arazuri. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Diego López de Haro II. Она умерла 16 января 1216 г. в местности визкеия, эускади, Испания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Toda Pérez de Azagra nació aproximadamente 1160, en Azagra, Navarra, España como hija de Pedro Ruíz de Azagra, I Señor de Albarracín y II Señoror de Estella y Toda Pérez de Arazuri. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Diego López de Haro II. Murió el 16 de enero de 1216, en Vizcaya, País Vasco, España, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en España.
